case_title: DARIUS DEAN VS. PBX LOGISTICS LTD. ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY DEAN, DARIUS AS TO DEFENDANT PBX LOGISTICS LTD. NOVAKOVIK, DALIBOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
